_comment: MV-system-001 — production observability fix. Extends uvicorn's own default logging.config.dictConfig (see uvicorn.config.LOGGING_CONFIG) with an ISO-8601 UTC timestamp prefix on every line, so /var/log/aether/api.log lines can be scoped to a test/incident time window (previously: uvicorn's default formatters carry no timestamp at all — see docs/delivery/MANUAL-VERIFICATION-GAPS.json MV-system-001). Wired in via `uvicorn --log-config logging_config.json` (start-api.sh). Production host clock is confirmed UTC (timedatectl: Etc/UTC) so a literal 'Z' suffix is accurate.
